nasb.text: He stores up sound wisdom for the upright; He is a shield to those who walk in integrity,

esv.text: he stores up sound wisdom for the upright; he is a shield to those who walk in integrity,

cnv.text: 他為正直人珍藏大智慧， 給行為完全的人作盾牌；

ccb.text: 祂使正直人充满智慧， 是行为纯全者的盾牌。

csbs.text: 他为正直人留存真知， 他是行事纯全人的盾牌；
